channel.title: Projects on Keelan Reilly
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Keelan Reilly

item.title: Quantised CNN Inference Accelerator
item.description: This project implements a complete CNN inference pipeline in SystemVerilog. I built it to understand the tradeoffs of fixed-function hardware accelerators: the performance gains they deliver, and the flexibility they give up when data movement, arithmetic precision, and control timing are handled explicitly in hardware.
